name: LocalAGI
description: LocalAGI is a self-hostable AI agent platform with a web UI, OpenAI-compatible APIs, and local-first model orchestration.

notes.text: GPU passthrough can be enabled during CT creation. Backend auto-selects (`cu128` for NVIDIA, `rocm7.2` for AMD) and falls back to CPU.
Set `var_localagi_backend=cpu|cu128|rocm7.2` (or `var_torch_backend`) to force a specific backend profile.
